description: Style NoteMake working out an absolute pleasure in this racer back top from adidas. This cotton and lycra mix top helps you stay cool during workout sessions. Pair this with tights or skinny jeans and you're all set to take on the world.Product DetailsRed racer back t-shirt made of climacool cotton, has a round neck, Adidas patented 3-stripes on the front, branding in rubber print on the left chest and a mesh panel on the back with a panel coveringMaterial and Care92% cotton and 8% lycraHand wash gentlyDo not machine wash or use fabric softenersWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 32& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
